name: phactoryfit
description: Security metadata and repeatable checks for the PhactoryFit static PWA with curated U.S. restaurant search.

scripts.audit:security: npm run test:static && npm run test:service-worker && npm run test:browser-security && npm run test:restaurant && node --check app.js && node --check restaurant-foods.js && node --check service-worker.js && npm audit --omit=dev --audit-level=high
